name: Shinobi Alliance Sai (S)
pageTitle: Shinobi Alliance Sai (S) - Naruto Arena Classic
description: Sai became capable of using a wider variety of techniques after improving his skills with his animal paintings. Besides that, Sai carries with him his powerful Sealing Technique.

skills.name: Tiger Vision Staring Bullet
skills.description: By using this sealing technique, Sai stuns one enemy's harmful skills permanently and deals 25 damage to them each turn. If that enemy uses a new skill, this skill will end and Sai gains 1 genjutsu chakra. This skill ends if Sai is killed.

skills.name: Great Beast Painting: Kamikaze Birds
skills.description: Sai makes one enemy receive 5 additional damage from non-affliction skills* and deals them 10 piercing damage to them each turn permanently. If that enemy uses a new skill, they will take 20 piercing damage and then this skill will end. This skil ends if Sai is killed.

skills.name: Great Beast Painting: Ink Warriors
skills.description: Sai grants one ally and himself 20 points of destructible defense. If that ally's destructible defense is destroyed, 'Great Beast Painting: Kamikaze Birds' will have no cost for 1 turn. If Sai destructible defense is destroyed, 'Tiger Vision Staring Bullet' will cost 1 random chakra for 1 turn.

skills.name: Sai Kunai Parry
skills.description: This skill makes Shinobi Alliance Sai (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.
